syntax_4024.creator: Olyno
syntax_4024.title: Scope Test
syntax_4024.description: Create a test. The string is the name of the test.

en: Create a test. The string is the name of the test.

syntax_4025.creator: Olyno
syntax_4025.title: Assert Condition
syntax_4025.description: Checks if condition is respected. Fails if it is not.

en: Checks if condition is respected. Fails if it is not.

syntax_4026.creator: Olyno
syntax_4026.title: Assert Equals
syntax_4026.description: Checks if a value is equal to another. Fails if it is not.
syntax_4026.syntax_pattern:
assert [is] equal[s] %object% to %object% [with [[error] message] %string%]
assert [is] not equal[s] %object% to %object% [with [[error] message] %string%]

en: Checks if a value is equal to another. Fails if it is not.

syntax_4027.creator: Olyno
syntax_4027.title: Assert Null
syntax_4027.description: Checks if a value is null. Throw an error if it is not.
syntax_4027.syntax_pattern:
assert [is] null %object% [with [[error] message] %string%]
assert [is] not null %object% [with [message] %string%]

en: Checks if a value is null. Throw an error if it is not.

syntax_4028.creator: Olyno
syntax_4028.title: Assert True/False
syntax_4028.description: Checks if a value is true/false. Fails if it is not.
syntax_4028.syntax_pattern:
assert [is] true [if] <.+> [with [[error] message] %string%]
assert [is] false [if] <.+> [with [[error] message] %string%]

en: Checks if a value is true/false. Fails if it is not.

syntax_4029.creator: Olyno
syntax_4029.title: Fail Test
syntax_4029.description: Makes the test fail if a condition is respected (or just force to fail the test).
syntax_4029.syntax_pattern:
fail [the] test [with [[error] message] %string%]
fail [the] test [if] <.+> [with [[error] message] %string%]

en: Makes the test fail if a condition is respected (or just force to fail the test).
